name: Strength
description: Focuses on increasing muscle strength by lifting heavy weights with fewer repetitions.

name: Hypertrophy
description: Aims to increase muscle size by performing moderate weights with moderate repetitions.

name: HIIT
description: High-Intensity Interval Training that improves cardiovascular fitness and burns fat through short bursts of intense exercise followed by rest periods.

name: Endurance
description: Targets improving muscle endurance and cardiovascular stamina by performing exercises with higher repetitions and lower weights or moderate intensity over longer durations.

name: Flexibility
description: Focuses on increasing the range of motion in the joints and muscles through stretching exercises and flexibility training.
